response.justification: Strong individual contributor with broad polyglot experience, but the role is an executive CTO position requiring 10+ years with 5+ in senior technical leadership at scale-ups, demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems, fintech infrastructure depth, and a track record scaling teams from 10 to 30+. The resume shows Senior/Staff IC roles with no people-management scope, no evidence of operating production multi-agent systems, and only tangential fintech exposure (RIDE Capital for ~15 months). The agentic-AI work mentioned at re:cinq is recent and framed as contribution to tooling rather than architecting production multi-agent platforms.
strengths: Broad full-stack and distributed-systems exposure including high-throughput work at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Some recent exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based) and open-source platform ownership via GISCollective
concerns: No evidence of executive leadership or scaling engineering orgs from 10 to 30+ people
No demonstrated production multi-agent AI system ownership at the scale or rigor required
Limited fintech-infrastructure depth — only ~15 months at RIDE Capital, no credit/risk or working-capital systems experience

key_factors.factor: No production multi-agent AI systems experience
